description: The `aspire agent init` command now prompts you to choose which AI environment locations to configure (e.g., .agents/ standard locations) and which skills or MCP server configurations to install. Also adds a `dotnet inspect` skill and an updated `aspire` skill with TypeScript polyglot AppHost context. Fixes a bug where playwright-cli skill was never installed on Windows.
name: Improved AI agent init with location selection and standard skill support
